notes: NVIDIA's flagship open LLM family (Nemotron 3: Nano/Super/Ultra, 2025-2026), hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE for agentic reasoning. Coined name = NVIDIA's NeMo framework ("NEural MOdules", said NEE-mo) + the -tron suffix, so the prevailing reading is first-syllable-stressed NEE-moh-tron. Some devs mis-read it as nem-oh-TRON / nuh-MOT-ron; the NeMo etymology favors NEE-moh-tron. No official creator-documented pronunciation in text. STRESS: NEE-moh-tron.
